mapper.sql: id, code, name, provider_type, base_url, status
mapper.select: select from providers order by id desc

select count(1) from providers where code = #{code}
and id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: insert into providers(code, name, provider_type, base_url, status) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{providerType}, #{baseUrl}, #{status})
mapper.update: update providers set code = #{code}, name = #{name}, provider_type = #{providerType}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
